---
title: "RSVP"
back-to-top-navigation: false
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

:::: rsvp-page
::: rsvp-intro
We can't wait to celebrate with you.
:::

<p class="rsvp-note">

Please RSVP by <strong>June 1, 2027</strong> so we can finalize seating and catering. If you have any questions in the meantime, reach out any time.

</p>
::::

::: rsvp-page
Our wedding registry will be available soon! In lieu of traditional gifts, we're kindly asking for contributions toward our honeymoon — helping us create memories we'll cherish for a lifetime.
:::

:::: rsvp-page

::: rsvp-form-wrapper
<iframe src="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf_J_WEcAoo7ZqpjGk0KrEPSbqCobZzhrEkYVospH79JYJIVA/viewform?embedded=true" width="640" height="1402" frameborder="0" marginheight="0" marginwidth="0">

Loading…

</iframe>

</iframe>
:::

<p class="rsvp-fallback">

Having trouble with the form above? You can also <a href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf_J_WEcAoo7ZqpjGk0KrEPSbqCobZzhrEkYVospH79JYJIVA/viewform?usp=header" target="_blank">open it in a new tab</a>.

</p>
::::
